release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.6.0 adds Meta Catalog / WhatsApp Business Catalog sync (dry-run + live), independent per-target active-product lists, a 500-product WhatsApp limit enforced in the UI, and Meta live sync results now logged to the same centralized Logs table WooCommerce uses. Also tightens the "Pilih Target Sync" dialog (no more Mode dropdown, sizing now tracks its natural layout). No changes to WooCommerce sync logic, pricing, or the Batch API/STOP SYNC/index fixes from v0.5.x.
